catalog.title: Golden Gate Bridge over San Francisco Bay
catalog.description: A breathtaking view of the iconic Golden Gate Bridge, showcasing its distinct orange hue as it spans the San Francisco Bay with the city skyline in the background. This world-renowned suspension bridge is a symbol of engineering marvel and a major tourist attraction in California.

caption: Golden Gate Bridge: Iconic beauty spanning San Francisco's shimmering bay.

catalog.title: Eiffel Tower and Champ de Mars, Paris
catalog.description: The iconic Eiffel Tower stands tall against a clear blue sky, viewed from the lush green expanse of the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. This world-renowned iron lattice monument is a symbol of French engineering and a top global tourist attraction.

caption: Parisian perfection: the iconic Eiffel Tower bathed in sunlight.
